## Summary

Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Review checklist for maintainers

- [ ] Verified links (internal relative paths resolve).
- [ ] JetPack / SDK Manager version numbers updated if flows changed materially.
- [ ] No passwords, tokens, serial numbers, or internal-only IPs pasted.
- [ ] Troubleshooting additions include **symptom → fix → verification command**.
- [ ] Tested mentally against at least **one successful** and **one failed** path referenced.

## Screenshots / logs (optional)

Redact secrets. Prefer text excerpts over full logs.
